stories.story: As a Patient, I want to log in with a demo account so that I can access the appointment system.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given a patient demo account, when I enter valid credentials, then I am logged in and see the patient dashboard.

stories.story: As a Patient, I want to create an appointment request with date/time so that I can book a slot.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged in as patient, when I submit a new appointment request with date and time, then the appointment is created with status Pending Review.

stories.story: As a Patient, I want to view the status of my own appointments so that I can track updates.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged in as patient, when I view my dashboard, then I see a list of my appointments and their statuses.

stories.story: As a Doctor, I want to log in and see a shared queue of pending appointments so that I can review them.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged in as doctor, when I access the staff dashboard, then I see a list of all appointments with status Pending Review.

stories.story: As a Doctor, I want to confirm or cancel an appointment so that the patient knows the outcome.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged in as doctor, when I confirm an appointment, then its status changes to Confirmed; when I cancel, status changes to Cancelled.

stories.story: As an Admin Staff, I want to log in and perform the same review actions as a doctor.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged in as admin, when I access the staff dashboard, then I can confirm or cancel appointments.

stories.story: As the Clinic System, I want to detect and flag conflicting appointments so that double-booking is avoided.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given two appointments with the same date and time are active (not cancelled), then the system flags a conflict.

stories.story: As the Clinic System, I want to reject any appointment content containing diagnosis, treatment, or prescription wording so that safety boundaries are maintained.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given an appointment request contains words like 'diagnosis', when submitted, then the system rejects it with an error.

stories.story: As the Clinic System, I want to provide a non-diagnostic administrative summary for an appointment so that staff can review scheduling context without medical advice.
stories.acceptance_criteria: Given an existing appointment, when GET /api/appointments/<id>/summary is called, then the response contains only administrative appointment details and status, with no diagnosis or treatment advice.
